name: MSI MAG FORGE 100R ARGB
highlights: MAG FORGE 100R Mid-Tower Gaming Case is engineered for gamers who demand style, airflow, and easy build compatibility
Supporting ATX, Micro-ATX, and Mini-ITX motherboards, this case features two pre-installed ARGB fans in the front and a rear 120mm fan for optimal cooling
With support for up to a 330mm GPU, 240mm top radiator, and 3
5” drives, the MAG FORGE 100R combines versatility and performance in a sleek design ready for any build
